items.raw_desc: LTE antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G:        Directional antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G with cross-polarization is the optimal solution for 4G/5G reception and backward compatible with LTE/2G/3G in areas with weak signal. Two integrated 2 MIMO antennas with opposite polarization support diversity of reception and thus ensure a quality signal. Compared to the previous generation, this antenna has a redesigned inner part for even higher efficiency. In addition to the new bands, the gain at 1700 MHz and 2.7 GHz is approximately 3 dB higher than the previous generation. Antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G  is supplied with double low-loss cable HDF-195 of 5 m length terminated with 2× SMA-m connector. The SMA connector used is commonly used in a wide range of routers. To maximize signal quality and minimize potential transients, the antenna does not use connectors and the cable is connected directly. items.desc: Medence szivattyú CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 szűrőszivattyú:The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 filter pump ensures clean and clear pool water. Suitable for pools up to 30 m³. It is quick and easy to install, the connection is compatibl…
items.raw_desc: Medence szivattyú CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 szűrőszivattyú:The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 filter pump ensures clean and clear pool water. Suitable for pools up to 30 m³. It is quick and easy to install, the connection is compatible with 32/38 mm flexible hose or 50 mm PVC pipe. The pump offers a flow rate of 6 m³ per hour and has a pre-filter to catch coarser impurities. The transparent pre-filter lid allows to check the filter contamination. The powder-coated motor resists water and chemicals, while the reinforced plastic housing components resist chlorine. The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 filter pump is self-priming. It is installed a maximum of 2 m above the water level and 3 m below the water level.                     Key features of the CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 filter pumpThe filter pump ensures clean and clear pool waterSuitable for pools up to 30 m³Excellent for quick and easy installationOffers a flow rate of 6 m³ per hourPre-filter catches coarser dirtPowder-coated motor resists water and chemicalsThe CF GROUP Aqua Plus 6 filter pump is self-priming
